summary.shape_sentence: Wide two-way reversal day: early upside failure, sharp selloff, lunch rally, afternoon lower-low flush, then late reclaim into close.

goat.note: Cleanest expansion was the late-morning upside drive from roughly 26125 to 26235 into lunch supply.

red_circles.behavior: Best bearish pivots appeared after failed highs: early spike failure, lunch rejection near upper supply, and post-13:00 breakdown continuation.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots were mostly reversal signals near morning demand, afternoon demand, and the late-session LOD bounce.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 26235-26255 was respected twice; minor 26115-26130 supply was reclaimed into the close.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 26035-26045 held in the morning but broke late; deeper demand near 26018 triggered the closing reversal.

time_markers.10am_blue: Rolling over from the early spike; bearish momentum expanded below roughly 26160 shortly after.
time_markers.12pm_red: Near the lunch rally high around 26230-26240; this became the major failed reclaim zone.
time_markers.2pm_green: Pressing into the lower distribution near 26045-26055 after the afternoon selloff.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed near 26119.5 after a late recovery from the LOD, but still below the open.

takeaway: Bearish two-way reversal day with early high failure, lunch reclaim into respected supply, afternoon lower-low flush, and a strong late reversal attempt that still closed below the open.
